name: minegpt-bot
description: Bot de Minecraft Java com Mineflayer para comandos via chat

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check catalog.js && node --check inventory.js && node --check perception.js && node --check survival.js && node --check crafting.js && node --check action-result.js && node --check skills.js && node --check state.js && node --check scripts/check-catalog.js && node --check scripts/check-inventory.js && node --check scripts/check-skills.js && node --check scripts/check-crafting.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:catalog && npm run test:inventory && npm run test:skills && npm run test:crafting
